# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers;  // adjust accordingly based on your directory structure in the Laravel application  
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;   
                                              
class ProductController extends Controller {          
public function search(Request $request)     {           
$search = $request->input('search');      
                                             // query logic using DB::raw() to get more complex filtering if necessary.  for example, this might be a fulltext keyword match or range filter  
            $products = DB::table('product')-> 
                      ->where(DB::raw("MATCH (name) AGAINST(:searchTerm IN BOOLEAN MODE)"), 'like', "%".$request->input('search')."%")  // using MySQL fulltext keyword search   
                  ->orWhere('category','LIKE',"%{$request->input('search')}%")  
                 ->whereBetween('price',[ $request->input('low_range'),  $request->input('high_range')]) // price range filter     – adjust as per your database structure       ;   
                  if (count($products) > 0){      return response()->  json(['status'=>1,'message' => 'success','data' => $products],200);}   else {return response() ->json(['status' => 0, ‘message’= > "Products not found"],404); }   
           });     };                                                            // closure for the function. Adjust this section as necessary to complete your requirements                      );                                                                                           return $next($request);                       })          ;
